  "claims": [
    "California is home to approximately 1.8 million veterans, of which 180,000 are female.",
    "Women veterans are less inclined to seek needed veterans benefits than their male counterparts.",
    "The United States Department of Veteran Affairs reports that women are the fastest growing demographic within the veteran community.",
